items.title: Martial law, protests and a president tried for insurrection: How did South Korea get here?
items.dek: A court is due to deliver its verdict in the insurrection trial of Yoon Suk Yeol.
items.body: A court is due to deliver its verdict in the insurrection trial of Yoon Suk Yeol.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Eight skiers found dead after California avalanche
items.dek: Fifteen skiers went missing on Tuesday following a massive avalanche in California's Lake Tahoe region. One person remains missing but is presumed dead.
items.body: Fifteen skiers went missing on Tuesday following a massive avalanche in California's Lake Tahoe region. One person remains missing but is presumed dead.
items.author: IriLine Desk
